scripts.install:all: npm --prefix ./eventdb/mvp-node install && npm --prefix ./fitness-foremoz/apps/api install && npm --prefix ./fitness-foremoz/apps/vite install && npm --prefix ./coach-foremoz/apps/api install && npm --prefix ./coach-foremoz/apps/vite install && npm --prefix ./passport-foremoz/apps/api install && npm --prefix ./passport-foremoz/apps/vite install
scripts.setup:all: npm run setup:fitness && npm run setup:coach && npm run setup:passport
scripts.setup:fitness: sh -c 'DB=${DB_FITNESS_URL:-postgresql://postgres:ljcom2x@localhost:5432/eventdb_fitness}; DATABASE_URL=$DB npm --prefix ./eventdb run db:schema && DATABASE_URL=$DB npm --prefix ./fitness-foremoz/apps/api run db:read-model'
scripts.setup:coach: sh -c 'DB=${DB_COACH_URL:-postgresql://postgres:ljcom2x@localhost:5432/eventdb_coach}; DATABASE_URL=$DB npm --prefix ./eventdb run db:schema && DATABASE_URL=$DB npm --prefix ./coach-foremoz/apps/api run db:read-model'
scripts.setup:passport: sh -c 'DB=${DB_PASSPORT_URL:-postgresql://postgres:ljcom2x@localhost:5432/eventdb_passport}; DATABASE_URL=$DB npm --prefix ./eventdb run db:schema && DATABASE_URL=$DB npm --prefix ./passport-foremoz/apps/api run db:read-model'
scripts.dev:fitness: sh -c 'DB=${DB_FITNESS_URL:-postgresql://postgres:ljcom2x@localhost:5432/eventdb_fitness}; EVENTDB_PORT=${EVENTDB_FITNESS_PORT:-3020}; API_PORT=${API_FITNESS_PORT:-3300}; DATABASE_URL=$DB PORT=$EVENTDB_PORT npm --prefix ./eventdb run dev & E=$!; DATABASE_URL=$DB PORT=$API_PORT npm --prefix ./fitness-foremoz/apps/api run dev & A=$!; npm --prefix ./fitness-foremoz/apps/vite run dev & V=$!; trap "kill $E $A $V 2>/dev/null || true" INT TERM EXIT; wait'
scripts.dev:coach: sh -c 'DB=${DB_COACH_URL:-postgresql://postgres:ljcom2x@localhost:5432/eventdb_coach}; EVENTDB_PORT=${EVENTDB_COACH_PORT:-3021}; API_PORT=${API_COACH_PORT:-3400}; DATABASE_URL=$DB PORT=$EVENTDB_PORT npm --prefix ./eventdb run dev & E=$!; DATABASE_URL=$DB PORT=$API_PORT npm --prefix ./coach-foremoz/apps/api run dev & A=$!; npm --prefix ./coach-foremoz/apps/vite run dev & V=$!; trap "kill $E $A $V 2>/dev/null || true" INT TERM EXIT; wait'
scripts.dev:passport: sh -c 'DB=${DB_PASSPORT_URL:-postgresql://postgres:ljcom2x@localhost:5432/eventdb_passport}; EVENTDB_PORT=${EVENTDB_PASSPORT_PORT:-3022}; API_PORT=${API_PASSPORT_PORT:-3600}; DATABASE_URL=$DB PORT=$EVENTDB_PORT npm --prefix ./eventdb run dev & E=$!; DATABASE_URL=$DB PORT=$API_PORT npm --prefix ./passport-foremoz/apps/api run dev & A=$!; npm --prefix ./passport-foremoz/apps/vite run dev & V=$!; trap "kill $E $A $V 2>/dev/null || true" INT TERM EXIT; wait'
scripts.dev:all: sh -c 'DB1=${DB_FITNESS_URL:-postgresql://postgres:ljcom2x@localhost:5432/eventdb_fitness}; DB2=${DB_COACH_URL:-postgresql://postgres:ljcom2x@localhost:5432/eventdb_coach}; DB3=${DB_PASSPORT_URL:-postgresql://postgres:ljcom2x@localhost:5432/eventdb_passport}; DATABASE_URL=$DB1 PORT=${EVENTDB_FITNESS_PORT:-3020} npm --prefix ./eventdb run dev & E1=$!; DATABASE_URL=$DB2 PORT=${EVENTDB_COACH_PORT:-3021} npm --prefix ./eventdb run dev & E2=$!; DATABASE_URL=$DB3 PORT=${EVENTDB_PASSPORT_PORT:-3022} npm --prefix ./eventdb run dev & E3=$!; DATABASE_URL=$DB1 PORT=${API_FITNESS_PORT:-3300} npm --prefix ./fitness-foremoz/apps/api run dev & A1=$!; DATABASE_URL=$DB2 PORT=${API_COACH_PORT:-3400} npm --prefix ./coach-foremoz/apps/api run dev & A2=$!; DATABASE_URL=$DB3 PORT=${API_PASSPORT_PORT:-3600} npm --prefix ./passport-foremoz/apps/api run dev & A3=$!; npm --prefix ./fitness-foremoz/apps/vite run dev & V1=$!; npm --prefix ./coach-foremoz/apps/vite run dev & V2=$!; npm --prefix ./passport-foremoz/apps/vite run dev & V3=$!; trap "kill $E1 $E2 $E3 $A1 $A2 $A3 $V1 $V2 $V3 2>/dev/null || true" INT TERM EXIT; wait'
